Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin deep within woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Country Cabin

Video.summary: Bob paints the northern lights.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Northern Lights

Video.summary: Bob paints a waterfall beneath a glacier.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Towering Glacier

Video.summary: Bob paints evergreens overlooking flowers.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daisy Delight

Video.summary: Bob paints a sloping stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints a tree beside a stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hidden Stream

Video.summary: Bob frames a pretty barn within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Oval Barn

Video.summary: Bob paints a colorful landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Splashes of Autumn

Video.summary: Bob paints a winter landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Evergreens

Video.summary: Bob paints a home on a cliff.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Deep Wilderness Home

Video.summary: Bob paints a tranquil beach scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rowboat on the Beach

Video.summary: Bob paints a forlorn forest cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snowbound Cabin

Video.summary: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Foot of the Mountain

Video.summary: A path of cacti and rocks leads right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cactus at Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a secluded waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Oriental Falls

Video.summary: Bob paints a secluded stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Country Creek

Video.summary: Bob creates illusions of depth and dimension.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Dimensions

Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin nestled in a valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Haven in the Valley

Video.summary: Bob paints a thawing landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Not Quite Spring

Video.summary: Bob paints a frosty winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wintertime Blues

Video.summary: Bob paints a scenic river.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Around the Bend

Video.summary: Bob paints a pastel seashore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Pastel Seascape

Video.summary: Guest painter Steve Ross uses a lot of color in a depiction of giant peaks behind foothills opening onto a smooth lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Range

Video.summary: Bob paints a hazy woods on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Purple Haze

Video.summary: Bob paints a southern scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cypress Swamp

Video.summary: Bob paints a landscape in an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Countryside Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a scene of early winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Russet Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a bridge in the woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Footbridge

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Hideaway

Video.summary: Bob paints a waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Enchanted Falls Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a remote fishing spot.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hideaway Cove

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates his wet-on-wet technique.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Red Sunset

Video.summary: Bob highlights a snowy scene with blue.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lonely Retreat

Video.summary: With guest artist Steve Ross.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Summer in the Mountains

Video.summary: Bob paints a path in the woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Palette

Video.summary: Bob paints ocean waves rolling ashore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Surf's Up

Video.summary: Bob paints a golden field of sparse pines and other greenery inside the unique shape of a tapered rectangle with cut-in corners.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Majestic Pine

Video.summary: Bob paints firs, peaks and water.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Portrait of Winter

Video.summary: Painting the sun as it sets over a deserted beach.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ocean Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a warm sun high in the sky to offset the cold mountainscape below.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Frost

Video.summary: Bob creates an effect using masking tape on the canvas as he paints the sky and mountains as a backdrop for a meadow, trees and a cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Triple View

Video.summary: Painting a small cabin on the shore of a lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lakeside Cabin
